title: Google ships the AI assistant Apple promised but hasn't delivered
description: The feature set, now entering beta, allows Gemini to coordinate complex tasks directly on Android devices. That means taking cues from conversations, parsing the context of a screen, and performing real-world actions – such as placing food orders or booking rides – within third-party apps. title: AI Impact Summit 2026 boosts India’s artificial ambitions on global stage
description: India hosted the AI Impact Summit 2026 in New Delhi from February 16 to 20, securing USD 200 billion in AI investment commitments. The summit focused on human-centric AI, ethical frameworks like the New Delhi Declaration, and strengthening India’s role in global AI innovation
